homepage.heroSubline: Oklahoma City's trusted driveway paving experts. Quality paving, built to last through Oklahoma's toughest weather.
aboutText: Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Oklahoma City homeowners with durable, beautiful driveways that stand the test of time. Frustrated by seeing shoddy paving work crumble under Oklahoma's harsh climate, we decided to bring a higher standard to the industry.

Our approach is straightforward: quality materials, expert craftsmanship, and unwavering attention to detail. We understand the nuances of Oklahoma City's soil and weather patterns, and we build our driveways to withstand it all, from scorching summers to icy winters. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind our work.

We're not just paving driveways; we're building relationships within the Oklahoma City community. We believe in honest communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. When you choose Precision Pavement Maintenance, you're choosing a partner who cares about your property and your satisfaction.

valueProps.title: Weather-Resistant Paving

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Precision Pavement Maintenance today for a free estimate and experience the difference quality paving makes.

services.name: Asphalt Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and cost-effective asphalt driveways built to withstand Oklahoma's climate.
services.description:
Asphalt driveway paving is a popular choice for Oklahoma City homeowners seeking a durable and cost-effective solution. At Precision Pavement Maintenance, we specialize in asphalt driveway installation, repair, and resurfacing. Our experienced team understands the specific challenges posed by Oklahoma's climate, including extreme temperatures and seasonal shifts that can impact asphalt integrity. We use only high-quality asphalt mixes designed to resist cracking, rutting, and other forms of damage.

Our asphalt paving process begins with a thorough site assessment to evaluate soil conditions and drainage patterns. We then prepare the base layer with precision, ensuring proper compaction and grading to prevent future issues. Our skilled paving crew carefully applies the asphalt, paying close attention to detail to achieve a smooth, even surface. We also offer asphalt sealing services to protect your driveway from the elements and extend its lifespan.

Whether you're looking to install a new asphalt driveway or repair an existing one, Precision Pavement Maintenance is your trusted partner. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing, ensuring you know exactly what to expect. With our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can be confident that your asphalt driveway will provide years of reliable performance.

faq.question: How long will an asphalt driveway last in Oklahoma City?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, an asphalt driveway can last 15-20 years in Oklahoma City, even with our fluctuating temperatures.

faq.question: Do you offer asphalt sealing services?
faq.answer: Yes, we highly recommend sealing your asphalt driveway every 2-3 years to protect it from the elements and extend its lifespan.

faq.question: What is the best time of year to pave an asphalt driveway in OKC?
faq.answer: Spring and fall are generally the best times of year for asphalt paving in Oklahoma City, as the temperatures are moderate and the ground is dry.

services.name: Concrete Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and customizable concrete driveways for Oklahoma City homes.
services.description:
Concrete driveways offer a durable and aesthetically pleasing option for Oklahoma City homeowners. Precision Pavement Maintenance specializes in concrete driveway installation, repair, and replacement. Our skilled team understands the unique challenges presented by Oklahoma's clay soil and fluctuating temperatures, ensuring your concrete driveway is built to last. We use high-strength concrete mixes and employ proven techniques to minimize cracking and settling.

Our concrete paving process begins with a thorough site evaluation, including soil testing and drainage analysis. We then prepare the subgrade with precision, ensuring proper compaction and stability. Our experienced concrete finishers carefully pour and shape the concrete, paying close attention to detail to create a smooth, level surface. We also offer a variety of decorative concrete options, including stamped patterns, colored concrete, and exposed aggregate finishes, allowing you to customize your driveway to complement your home's architecture.

Whether you're looking to install a new concrete driveway or replace an existing one, Precision Pavement Maintenance is your trusted partner. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing, ensuring you know exactly what to expect. With our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can be confident that your concrete driveway will enhance the beauty and value of your property for years to come.

faq.question: How long will a concrete driveway last in Oklahoma City?
faq.answer: A properly installed and maintained concrete driveway can last 25-30 years or more in Oklahoma City.

faq.question: Do you offer decorative concrete options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of decorative concrete options, including stamped patterns, colored concrete, and exposed aggregate finishes.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent cracking in a concrete driveway?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation, the use of high-strength concrete mixes, and proper curing techniques are essential for preventing cracking in a concrete driveway.

services.name: Driveway Repair & Resurfacing
services.shortDescription: Fix cracks and restore your driveway's appearance with our expert repair services.
services.description:
Is your driveway cracked, crumbling, or showing signs of wear and tear? Precision Pavement Maintenance offers comprehensive driveway repair and resurfacing services to restore your driveway's beauty and functionality. We understand the challenges Oklahoma City's climate poses to driveways, from freeze-thaw cycles to extreme heat. Our experienced team can diagnose and address a wide range of driveway issues, including cracks, potholes, settling, and surface deterioration.

Depending on the severity of the damage, we offer various repair options, including crack filling, patching, and resurfacing. For minor cracks and potholes, we use high-quality patching materials that bond securely to the existing driveway surface. For more extensive damage, we may recommend resurfacing, which involves applying a new layer of asphalt or concrete over the existing driveway. This can significantly improve the appearance and lifespan of your driveway without the need for a complete replacement.

Whether you have an asphalt or concrete driveway, Precision Pavement Maintenance has the expertise to restore it to its original condition. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing, ensuring you know exactly what to expect. With our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can be confident that your driveway repair or resurfacing project will be completed to the highest standards.

faq.question: How do I know if my driveway needs repair or resurfacing?
faq.answer: If your driveway has multiple cracks, potholes, or significant surface deterioration, it's likely time for repair or resurfacing. We can provide a free inspection to assess the damage and recommend the best course of action.

faq.question: Can you repair cracks in asphalt driveways?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer crack filling services for asphalt driveways. We use high-quality crack sealant to prevent water from penetrating the cracks and causing further damage.

faq.question: How long does driveway resurfacing take?
faq.answer: The duration of driveway resurfacing depends on the size and condition of your driveway, but it typically takes 1-3 days to complete.

services.name: Driveway Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect your asphalt driveway from the elements with our professional sealing services.
services.description:
Protect your investment and extend the life of your asphalt driveway with Precision Pavement Maintenance's professional driveway sealing services. Sealing your asphalt driveway is a crucial step in preventing damage from the elements, including sun, rain, oil, and chemicals. In Oklahoma City, with our intense summers and occasional ice storms, sealing is even more important to protect your driveway from cracking and deterioration.

Our experienced team uses high-quality sealant products that are specifically designed to penetrate and protect asphalt surfaces. Before sealing, we thoroughly clean your driveway to remove dirt, debris, and oil stains. We then apply the sealant evenly, ensuring complete coverage. Our sealing process helps to prevent water penetration, which can lead to cracking and potholes. It also protects your driveway from harmful UV rays and chemicals, extending its lifespan and maintaining its appearance.

Precision Pavement Maintenance recommends sealing your asphalt driveway every 2-3 years to maintain its optimal condition. Our driveway sealing services are affordable and effective, providing long-lasting protection for your investment. Contact us today for a free estimate and let us help you keep your asphalt driveway looking its best.

faq.question: How often should I seal my asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: We recommend sealing your asphalt driveway every 2-3 years to maintain its optimal condition.

faq.question: What are the benefits of sealing my driveway?
faq.answer: Sealing your driveway protects it from water penetration, UV rays, oil, and chemicals, extending its lifespan and enhancing its appearance.

faq.question: How long does it take for the sealant to dry?
faq.answer: The sealant typically takes 24-48 hours to dry, depending on the weather conditions.

services.name: Driveway Grading & Excavation
services.shortDescription: Proper grading and excavation for a solid driveway foundation.
services.description:
A solid driveway starts with proper grading and excavation. Precision Pavement Maintenance provides expert driveway grading and excavation services to ensure a stable and long-lasting foundation for your driveway. In Oklahoma City, where clay soil and drainage issues are common, proper grading and excavation are essential to prevent settling, cracking, and water damage.

Our experienced team uses specialized equipment to precisely grade and excavate your driveway area, ensuring proper slope and drainage. We remove any unsuitable soil and replace it with compacted gravel or other suitable base materials. Our grading and excavation services are tailored to the specific needs of your property, taking into account soil conditions, drainage patterns, and local building codes. We pay close attention to detail to ensure a level and stable foundation for your driveway.

Whether you're installing a new driveway or repairing an existing one, Precision Pavement Maintenance's grading and excavation services are essential for a successful project. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing, ensuring you know exactly what to expect. With our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can be confident that your driveway will be built on a solid foundation.

faq.question: Why is proper grading and excavation important for a driveway?
faq.answer: Proper grading and excavation ensure a stable foundation for your driveway, preventing settling, cracking, and water damage.

faq.question: Do you handle drainage issues?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install drainage systems to prevent water from pooling on your driveway and causing damage.

faq.question: How do you determine the proper slope for a driveway?
faq.answer: We use specialized equipment and techniques to determine the proper slope for your driveway, taking into account soil conditions and drainage patterns.

services.name: Driveway Extensions
services.shortDescription: Expand your parking space with a professionally installed driveway extension.
services.description:
Need more parking space? Precision Pavement Maintenance offers professional driveway extension services to expand your parking area and enhance the functionality of your property. Whether you have a growing family, multiple vehicles, or simply want to improve the curb appeal of your home, a driveway extension can be a valuable addition.

Our experienced team can design and install a driveway extension that seamlessly integrates with your existing driveway. We take into account your property's layout, soil conditions, and local building codes to ensure a durable and aesthetically pleasing result. We offer a variety of materials and finishes to match your existing driveway, including asphalt, concrete, and decorative options. Our driveway extension services are tailored to your specific needs and preferences, ensuring a perfect fit for your home.

Precision Pavement Maintenance handles all aspects of your driveway extension project, from excavation and grading to paving and finishing. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing, ensuring you know exactly what to expect. With our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can be confident that your driveway extension will be a valuable and long-lasting investment.

faq.question: What are the benefits of adding a driveway extension?
faq.answer: A driveway extension increases parking space, enhances property value, and improves curb appeal.

faq.question: What materials can I use for a driveway extension?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of materials for driveway extensions, including asphalt, concrete, and decorative options.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a driveway extension?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on your location and the size of the extension. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

serviceAreas.content:
Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC is proud to serve the vibrant community of Oklahoma City with top-quality driveway paving services. We understand the unique needs of OKC residents and businesses, offering durable and aesthetically pleasing solutions for driveways of all sizes. From new installations to repairs and resurfacing, we're committed to providing exceptional workmanship and customer satisfaction.

Our team utilizes the latest techniques and high-quality materials to ensure long-lasting results that enhance the curb appeal and value of your property. Whether you're in the historic Paseo Arts District or the bustling Bricktown entertainment area, Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC is your trusted partner for all your driveway paving needs. We are dedicated to serving the entire Oklahoma City metro area and surrounding communities.

We offer a full range of services including asphalt paving, concrete paving, driveway repairs, sealcoating, and more. Our experienced team will work with you to find the best solution for your needs and budget. We are committed to providing quality workmanship and excellent customer service.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Precision Pavement Maintenance did an excellent job paving our new asphalt driveway. They were professional, efficient, and the driveway looks fantastic! The crew was very respectful of our property and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had several large cracks in our concrete driveway, and Precision Pavement Maintenance was able to repair them quickly and effectively. The price was reasonable, and the repairs seem very durable. I am happy with the service.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We hired Precision Pavement Maintenance to seal our asphalt driveway, and we're very pleased with the results. The driveway looks great, and we feel confident that it's protected from the elements. The team was punctual and professional.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: From start to finish, the team was professional and easy to work with. They communicated clearly throughout the process and delivered a beautiful concrete driveway that exceeded our expectations. Great work!

reviews.name: Ashley P.
reviews.text: Precision Pavement Maintenance added a driveway extension for us. The crew was efficient and professional, and the extension blends seamlessly with our existing driveway. It's exactly what we needed!

reviews.name: Robert C.
reviews.text: Our driveway was in terrible shape, with cracks and potholes everywhere. Precision Pavement Maintenance resurfaced it, and it looks brand new! They did an amazing job, and we couldn't be happier with the results.
